title: This is the most useful n8n workflow I have ever built...
summary: NeuralNine demonstrates two practical n8n workflows: one that automatically converts GitHub issues into pull requests, and another that turns Slack messages into GitHub issues. The video covers environment setup and implementation details for both automation pipelines.
